title: Duplicates of archived boards should be able to be unarchived by their new owners
excerpt:
Description
If a user copies an archived board, the new duplicate board is archived and the owner of the duplicated board doesn’t always have the means to unarchive the duplicate board.

posts.author: JustinThibault (Justin Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

If a user copies an archived board, the new duplicate board is archived and the owner of the duplicated board doesn’t always have the means to unarchive the duplicate board.

What are you trying to achieve

Allow the owner of a board to have appropriate privileges.
